Orata onguru yOkarukondua kOmatoororero ka Katutra mOndivitivi, Ambrosius Tjipukuu Kandjii, ma suvisiwa muhuka mo Tjomukona mehi ra Mongua. Kandjii watire Oritjatatu ndazuko mo namiti ya Pako kombunda youvere o u supi. Mo ma toorore wOtukondua nOzongomainde wo 2020, ape ozombura mbari nÿazuko, eye otja zako ko otjo rata tjinga otjira tje tjo Swapo atja urika omuvarekwa warwe, Michael Aihuki, oku rarakana okarukondwa inga kuno' vira vyarwe. Nganda okarukondwa inga akee kuwira mo make wa Rodman Katjaimo wo Popular Democratic Movement (PDM). Posia kutja ondjira ye indji yeya komayandero otjiøa Kandjii tja uka tjinene kombunda yo nÿiro ya Walter Pakarae, okaøepo okaÞakame ko rupa ro Swapo mo ka ru kondwa nu tjinene mo Tjirata tjOvakrundu, eye ngwari okuwoko kwe okunene. Pakarae wata mu Kambundu mo 2020 omatoororero ama ye kakara mu Tjikukutu ombura tjingeyo. Okuwoko kwe okunene ingwi kwa Pakarae tja yekwa, Kandjii opa munina kutja ondjir ye komrungu ya hara ondorera. Na pekara nao O Swapo aipaha omuvarekwa warwe nu tjingetjo ai pandjara omatoororero mo ka Karukondua inga. Movingi otjo rata yo Karukondua inga ma zemburukirwa kOmaraisiro wOvina mo Katutura, indji o Katutura Expo ndja uta ombura kombunda yaindjo ndja toororwa mo 2010.

Otjomuise- Ombara yOvambanderu, Munjuku III Nguvauva, iumwe wo va nane ovatenga ombura indji oku zuvarekisa eraka re ohunga no zo mbakero zo Covid-19 nÿe tomba ozombakero zo mbazu. Ongendo indji Ombara Munjuku III wa tji rirwe ame i raisa erero muhuko munene mu Keetute no ndando yo ku vasisa ongendo ye indji kovanane ovakwao vombazu mo Maheke kutja ve kare neraka rimwe no nguta imwe tjapo harukuru ndji maa vevasisa ko u honapare. Tjingetjo kuye kweri kwambere Ombara Otjitambi yOvaherero, Ohahende Vekuii Rukoro, ngwatjere Ouhonapare wOmbazu wOvaherero, nai ukara autara mo zo veta peke peke ohunga no tjina ihi kutja tji ma vaza ko u honapare wehi auha kayenda maketjo nu ngwari no nguta yomasa. Nu wina airaisa ohepero yo vanane okuvaza ko vanane vo horomende otjo rongo. Ombara Turimuro Hoveka wOuhonapare wOmbazu wa Hoveka, mu Senina¿I ndjazuko, wina otjari aa raisa ongendo no ndando tjingeyo. Muvyarwe ovingi eye mbyaa tja mevi sekamene ohunga no Covid-19 mundu auhe ngwaÞu iyo mutjise imbwi poo mbwa tjama kuwo, oku hino’ ku kasuvisiwa kaziriire. Pendje na indu orutu tji rwa nyosiwa, otjo tjiri tjitjiri otjina otjipe nu otji heimukuru mOmbazu yOvambanderu nOvaherero. Ovihei mukuru vyo Covid-19, ombya tjitire kutja ondangere yomuhoko, Kainikova Kaizemi, ombura ndjazuko ma pewe ombakero ohimise mo Tjomuise ndji hasere okupewa omurumendu wo nÿengu ye mo tjiwa¿a tjo Vaherero nOvambanderu. Mena ro ngurunguse indji, Ombara Hoveka, otja raerere Keetute kutja ongaro ndji ma itombo ombazu yo muhoko na tja mei hungire kuno’ zombara ozongwao kutja veisekamene otjomundu umwe nu vehungame omauhonapare ngu ma veso oku hungama. Wina ombura ndjazuko Ombara Munjuku III, no tjiwa¿a tje ombari mo mi hoko omitenga oku ya kura no mi tima omi paturuke no mi pupurikwe ondiero yo tjiuri tjehi oku tandavarisa omapatero wo ma nyinga nyingiro mehi arihe mena Corona. Munao wina eye opu ma tjere tjeno’ uzeu no zo mbakero zo Covid-19 no mwano mbu ze tomba ombazu, okutja uno uzeu no ma zeva wo horomende wo ndjeverero no ndjururiro wo Covid-19. Katjiperi, Ombara Munjuku III ma yazau nao.

“Suverasaneye nomutima watjiri otja ovakriste.”—ROM. 12:10. EIMBURIRO 109 Suverasaneye nomutima auhe OMAPU KU MATU KATARA* 1. Ovikwaye mbi tjita kutja omaṱunḓu omengi ndino aye ha raisasana orusuvero? OMBEIBELA ya hunganeka kutja momayuva omasenina ovandu mave rire “ovehinarusuvero.” (2 Tim. 3:1, 3) Eṱe tu muna omayenenisiro womaprofetero ngo ndino. Otjotjihorera, ovanene ovengi ve teya otukupo, kunao iho tji tjita kutja ape ha kara ohange pokati kawo nu ovanatje ve rimuna okuhina okusuverwa. Nandarire omaṱunḓu nge kara mondjuwo imwe mape ya ave ha kara noupanga ouwa. Otjotjihorera, omuyandjandunge komaṱunḓu wa tja: “Ovanene novanatje kave hungire kumwe, nu ve ungurisa oruveze rwawo oruingi mozokombiuta, oukombiuta womomake, ozongoze zouye wa kandino poo ouvidio game. Nandarire kutja omaṱunḓu nga ya tura pamwe, owo kave tjiwasana nawa.” 2-3. (a) Matu sokuraisa orusuvero koouṋe otja kOvaroma 12:10? (b) Matu kahungirira kuye morupa ndwi? 2 Katu nokuvanga okuhorera kovandu mouye mbe ha raisasana orusuvero. (Rom. 12:2) Nungwari matu sokukara norusuvero oruingi komaṱunḓu wetu na wina kovakambure ovakwetu mombongo. (Lesa Ovaroma 12:10.) Hapo okusuverasana nomutima watjiri ku heya tjike? Ku heya omuano ovazamumwe mu ve raisasana orusuvero. Eṱe wina matu sokuraisira ovakambure ovakwetu mombongo orusuvero ndwo. Indu tji twa raisa orusuvero ndwo matu vatere ovandu avehe okukarera Jehova pamwe nondjoroka.—Mika 2:12. 3 Kutja tu kare norusuvero ndwo matu katara kovihorera mbi ri mOmbeibela. JEHOVA U “NORUSUVERO ORUKARERERE” 4. Epsalme 103:8 ma ri tu raere ye ohunga norusuvero rwa Jehova? 4 Ombeibela i hungira ohunga novikaṋena oviwa vya Jehova. Otjotjihorera, oyo i tja ‘Ndjambi orusuvero.’ (1 Joh. 4:8) Omambo ngo ye tjita kutja tu vange okurira epanga re. Posi yokutja Ombeibela wina i tja Jehova u “norusuvero orukarerere.” (Lesa Epsalme 103:8.) Tjiri omambo ngo ye raisa kutja Jehova we tu suvera tjinene. 5. Omomuano uṋe Jehova me tu raisira otjari, nu matu yenene okumuhorera vi? 5 Epsalme 103:8 wina ri hungira ohunga notjari tja Jehova. (Eks. 34:6) Omuano umwe Jehova me tu raisira otjari omokutuisira ozondataiziro zetu. (Eps. 51:1) MOmbeibela, otjikaṋena hi otjari tji kamburira mo ovingi kombanda yokuisira omundu kotjiṋa otjivi tja tjiti. Okukara notjari wina ku tu hinga kutja tu kondje okuvatera omundu ngu ri mouzeu. Omuano Jehova me vanga okutuvatera kwa kapita onḓero omukazendu omukwate ndje nayo yokuvanga okuvatera omuatje we. (Jes. 49:15) Indu tji turi kehi yomauzeu, otjari tja Jehova tji mu hinga kutja me tu vatere. (Eps. 37:39; 1 Kor. 10:13) Eṱe matu yenene okuraisa otjari kovakambure ovakwetu mokuveisira nokuhina okutjinda ongore indu tji ve tu pindikisa. (Ef. 4:32) Omuano warwe omunanḓengu mu matu yenene okuraisa otjari kovakambure ovakwetu omokuvevatera indu tji ve ri kehi yomauzeu. Orusuvero ru tu hinga kutja tu raise otjari kovakwetu, momuano mbwo tu horera ku Jehova ngu raisa orusuvero okukapita ovandu avehe.—Ef. 5:1. JONATAN “WA KARA NOMBANGO” NA DAVID 6. Jonatan na David va ri noupanga mbwa ri vi? 6 Ombeibela i hungira ohunga novandu mbe ha ri ohomonena, posi yokutja mbaave raisasana orusuvero. Ngatu tare kotjihorera tja Jonatan na David. Ombeibela i tja, Jonatan “wa kara nombango na David ne mu suvere tjinene otja tje risuvera omuini.” (1 Sam. 18:1) David wa twirisiwa otjombara okupingena Saul. Kombunda yanao, Saul aa ṱeruru tjinene na David nu aa kondjo okumuzepa. Posi yokutja, omuatje wa Saul, Jonatan, kena pa yandja oruvara ku ihe okuzepa David. Jonatan na David va kwizikasana kutja mave kayenda komurungu okurira omapanga nokuvaterasana aruhe.—1 Sam. 20:42. 7. Otjikwaye tja tja tji tjita kutja Jonatan na David ave ha rire omapanga? 7 Tjiri ya ri otjihimise kutja Jonatan na David va ri omapanga wopopezu, mena rokutja pa ri oviṋa ovingi mbya tja vi tjita kutja ave ha rire omapanga. Otjotjihorera, Jonatan wa ri omunene pu David nozombura ape 30. Jonatan kaa munu kutja eye kamaa yenene okurira epanga ropopezu ku nomundu ngwa ri omuṱiṱi pu ye, nu ngu hi nondjiviro ohunga nehupo. Nungwari wa tengere David tjinene. 8. Mo munu kutja ongwaye Jonatan tja ri epanga ewa ku David? 8 Atja rira oupupu ku Jonatan okuṱeruru na David. Mena rokutja Jonatan wa ri omuatje wOmbara Saul nu ongwaa sokupingena ihe. (1 Sam. 20:31) Posi yokutja eye wa ri omurisusuparise, nu wa ri omuṱakame ku Jehova. Kunao wa yandja oruvara kondando ya Jehova yokutja David ma ri re ombara. Eye wina wa ri omuṱakame ku David, nandarire kutja otjiṋa ho aatji pindikisa Saul tjinene.—1 Sam. 20:32-34. 9. Matu tjiwa vi kutja Jonatan kaa ṱeruru na David? 9 Mena rokutja Jonatan wa suverere David, eye kaa ṱeruru naye. Jonatan wa ri ombanḓe, wa rwa ovita ovingi nu aa tjiwa okuungurisa outa noviku nawa. Ovandu aave tja eye na ihe va ri “ovanatjikara pozonguvi, novanamasa pozongeyama.” (2 Sam. 1:22, 23) Jonatan e tje rihivira oviṋa mbya tjita mena rouvanḓe we. Posi yokutja, eye kaa kondjo okuungura nawa pu David nu kaa ṱeruru noviṋa oviwa David mbyaa tjiti. Nungwari Jonatan aa tjaterwa i youvanḓe wa David nomuano mbwee riyameke ku Jehova. Owatjiri owombwi wokutja, kombunda ya indu David tja zepa Goliat, Jonatan otja uta okusuvera David otja tje risuvera omuini. Omomuano uṋe mu matu yenene okuraisira ovakambure ovakwetu orusuvero? MATU RAISA VI ORUSUVERO NDINO? 10. ‘Okusuverasana tjiri nomutima auhe’ ku heya tjike? 10 Ombeibela i tu raera kutja, matu “sokusuverasana tjiri nomutima auhe.” (1 Petr. 1:22) Jehova u tupa otjihorera otjiwa. Eye we tu suvera tjinene nu tji turi ovaṱakame ku ye, eye kamaa isa okutusuvera. (Rom. 8:38, 39) Embo rOtjigrike ndi “nomutima auhe” ri yandja otjihorera tjomundu ngu tjita ozongondjero ozonene okuraisa orusuvero. Povikando tjiva irira ouzeu okuraisa orusuvero kovakambure ovakwetu. Indu varwe tji ve tu pindikisa matu hepa okukayenda komurungu okuṱakamisa omambo nga: “Zarasaneye norusuvero. Kondjeye okuṱakamisa oruwano ndu mu pewa i Ombepo ya Ndjambi. Nohange ndji za ku Ndjambi ngai mu waneke kumwe.” (Ef. 4:1-3) Indu tji twa kondjo nomasa okukara “nohange” ku novakambure ovakwetu, eṱe kamaatu yandja ombango kozondataiziro zawo. Nungwari matu kondjo pu matu yenene okuvara ovakambure ovakwetu otja Jehova tje ve vara.—1 Sam. 16:7; Eps. 130:3. 11. Ongwaye tji mape ya a rire ouzeu okuraisa orusuvero? 11 Kaaruhe tje ri oupupu okuraisira ovakambure ovakwetu orusuvero, tjinene indu tji matu tjiwa ozondataiziro zawo. Pe munika tjimuna Ovakriste veserewondo etenga va ri nouzeu mbwo wina. Otjotjihorera, Evodia na Sintike mape ya ka vari nouzeu ‘okuungura tjinene okuzuvarisa ombuze ombwa’ puna Paulus. Posi yokutja ya ri ouzeu kuwo okuungura pamwe. Kunao Paulus we ve tunduuza kutja “ve kare nomutima umwe mu Muhona.”—Fil. 4:2, 3. 12. Matu yenene vi okukara noupanga wopopezu pu novakambure vakwetu nokuvesuvera? 12 Ndino matu yenene vi okukara noupanga wopopezu pu novakambure vakwetu nokuvesuvera? Indu tji twa tjiwa ovakambure ovakwetu nawa irira oupupu okuvezuva nokukurisa orusuvero rwetu kuwo. Eṱe matu yenene okurira omapanga wawo nandarire kutja owo ovanene poo ovaṱiṱi pu eṱe, poo ombazu yawo ya panguka ku indji oyetu. Zemburuka kutja, Jonatan wa ri omunene pu David nozombura ape 30, posi yokutja owo va ri noupanga wopopezu. Hapo pe nomundu mombongo yeṋu ngu ri omunene poo omuṱiṱi pove ngu ma mu yenene okurira omapanga? Indu tji wa tjiti nao ove mo raisa kutja wa ‘suvera ovanangamburiro ovakweṋu!’—1 Petr. 2:17. 13. Ongwaye tji matu yenene okukara noupanga wopopezu ku novakambure tjiva mombongo? 13 Hapo okuraisa orusuvero kovakambure ovakwetu ku heya kutja matu kara noupanga wopopezu ku nomundu auhe mombongo? Kako, iho kamaape ya atji tjitwa. Okukara noupanga wopopezu ku novandu tjiva mena rokutja va suvera oviṋa mbi twa suvera katjiṋa otjivi. Jesus wa isana ovaapostele ve avehe kutja “omapanga” we, posi yokutja eye wa ri noupanga wopopezu tjinene kuna Johanes. (Joh. 13:23; 15:15; 20:2) Nungwari, eye kee mu tjindi nawa povaapostele varwe. Otjotjihorera, indu Johanes nerumbi re Jakobus tji va ningira Jesus okuvepa oruveze orunanḓengu mOuhona wa Mukuru, Jesus we ve raera kutja “ingwi okukahaama kokunene na kokumoho kwandje okwo kakwandje okuyandja.” (Mar. 10:35-40) Tjimuna Jesus, eṱe katu sokutjinda omapanga wetu wopopezu nawa pu varwe. (Jak. 2:3, 4) Indu tji twa tjiti nao, iho matji yeta ohaṋi mombongo.—Judas 17-19. 14. Omomuano uṋe Ovafilipi 2:3, mu ma ri tu vatere okuhina okukondja okurira ovasemba pu varwe? 14 Indu tji matu raisasana orusuvero ku tjita kutja a pe ha kara ombepo yokurihiva mombongo. Zemburuka kutja Jonatan kaa ṱeruru na David mokukondja okurira ombara. Atuhe matu yenene okuhorera ku Jonatan. O ṱeruru novakambure ovakweṋu mena roviṋa mbi mave yenene okutjita, “nungwari zarasaneye nomerisusuparisiro, aruhe ovakweṋu amamu ve vara otja ovanene pu eṋe.” (Lesa Ovafilipi 2:3.) Zemburuka kutja auhe wetu u notjiṋa tji ma yenene okutjita okuvatera ombongo. Indu tji twa kayenda komurungu okurira overisusuparise, iho tji tu vatera kutja tu yenene okumuna ovikaṋena oviwa movakambure ovakwetu nokurihongera kovihorera vyawo oviwa.—1 Kor. 12:21-25. 15. Ove we rihongere ko tjike okuza kotjihorera tja Tanya neṱunḓu re? 15 Indu tji tu ri kehi youzeu, Jehova u ungurisa ovakambure ovakwetu okuturaisira orusuvero nokutuvatera momiano pekepeke otjomuano wokutuhuhumiṋa. Tara ku imbi mbya tjitwa keṱunḓu rimwe kombunda yoprograma ya rOviungura yOmaworonganeno Omanene wouye auhe nga ri nepu ndi “Love Never Fails!” Oyo ya ri mombura ndji 2019 moUnited States. Tanya, ina wovanatje vetatu, wa tja: “Indu tjaatu hingi okuyenda konganda yovaryange Oroviungura ndwo, ohauto imwe yeriveta mohauto yetu. Kapena ngwa hihamwa, posi yokutja eṱe twa urumine tjinene nu atu piti mohauto atu kurama mondjira. Omundu umwe we tu raera kutja ngatu ye kohauto ye. Eye wa ri umwe wovakambure ovakwetu wina ngwaa zu pomaworonganeno. Nu wina pa ri ovakambure varwe mba kurama, owo va ri ovakambure vetano okuza koSweden. Omukazendu omukambure we ndji pukata nomauatje wandje omukazona, tjiri iho tja ri otjiṋa tjaatu hepa. Ami mba raera ovakambure ovakwetu kutja tu ri nawa nu owo mave yenene okuyenda. Posi yokutja, owo va kara mbo nandarire kombunda tji twa muna omapangero nu ve tu vatera noviṋa avihe mbyaa tu hepa. Eṱe tjiri twa muna orusuvero rwa Jehova moruveze oruzeu ndwo. Ongaro ndjo ye kurisa orusuvero rwetu kovakambure ovakwetu nokukurisa orusuvero rwetu nondangi ku Jehova.” Hapo ove mo zemburuka oruveze tjoo hepa ombatero nu omukambure e ku raisire orusuvero? 16. Omapu yeṋe ngu tu nawo wokuraisa orusuvero kovakambure ovakwetu? 16 Ripura uriri noviṋa oviwa mbi tjitwa indu tji matu raisasana orusuvero. Eṱe tu huhumiṋa ovakambure ovakwetu indu tji mave munu omauzeu. Nu tu ve vatera kutja tu karere pamwe Jehova nondjoroka. Indu tji matu tjiti nao, tu raisa kutja oweṱe ovahongewa va Jesus nu iho tji nana ovandu womitima omiwa okukarera Jehova. Nu tjinenenene, tu yandja ondjozikiro ku Jehova ngu ri ‘lhe younyaṋutima, nu Ndjambi womayaruriro pehi aehe womutima.’ (2 Kor. 1:3) Atuhe ngatu kayende komurungu okukurisa nokuraisasana orusuvero. EIMBURIRO 130 Isira varwe Jesus wa tja ovahongewa ve mave tjiukirwa korusuvero ndu mave raisasana. Atuhe tu kondja okuraisasana orusuvero ndwo. Eṱe tu sokurihonga okusuvera ovakambure ovakwetu tjimuna tji twa suvera omaṱunḓu wetu. Orupa ndwi maru tu vatere kutja tu kare norusuvero oruingi kovakambure ovakwetu mombongo. OMAKAHURURIRO WOTJIPERENDERO: Omunene wombongo omutanda ngu rihongera komunene wombongo omunene motjiwondo ma yakurwa norusuvero ponganda yomunene wombongo ngo. Owo novakazendu vawo mave raisasana orusuvero nouharupu.

Ouhona waMukuru u honapara! Omangete wovandu va muna ondjoroka nondjeverero kehi youhona waMukuru ousemba. Ove mo vanga okurira omuture? Omatjivisiro wondjoroka C. T. Russell nga tjita indu tji ya ri 2 ku Seninaṋi 1914, ya yenenisiwa vi? EKONDWA 1 Jesus aa hungire tjinene ohunga nOuhona waMukuru okukapita ngamwa omapu warwe. Owo mau ya momuano uṋe nu oruṋe? EKONDWA 2 Ouṋe ngwa vatera ovakongorere vaJesus kombanda yehi okurirongerisira Ouhona waMukuru? Ovitjitwa viṋe mbya raisa kutja Ouhona waMukuru ohoromende yatjiri? EKONDWA 3 Ouhona mbu mau honaparerwa i Messias wa ri norupa mondando yaMukuru okuza kombutiro poo indee? Jesus wa tjiukisa vi ovingi ohunga nOuhona? EKONDWA 4 Ouhona wa yenenisa tjike ohunga nena raMukuru? Ove mo yenene vi okukara norupa mokuyapura ena raJehova? EKONDWA 5 Muna omazuviro omawa ohunga nOuhona waMukuru, novanane na imba mbe riwisa kehi yawo, nokutja okurira ovaṱakame ku wo ku heya tjike. EKONDWA 6 Ongwaye Jesus tja ri nongamburiro kutja ma kara novayandjaruvara overiyandjere momayuva omasenina? Mo yenene okuraisa vi kutja Ouhona ootjiṋa otjitenga mehupo roye? EKONDWA 7 Rihonga ohunga nomiano pekepeke ovakarere vaMukuru mbi va ungurisa kutja ve vasise ombuze ombwa kovandu ovengi ngunda omaandero aye hiye ya. EKONDWA 8 Oviungura vyetu vyomatorokero vi raisa vi kutja tu ungura nombatero yOmbara? Oviṋenge viṋe ohunga nomambo wetu mbi ku raisira kutja Ouhona otjiṋa otjinanḓengu? EKONDWA 9 Jesus wa honga ovahongewa ve oviuṋe vivari ovinanḓengu ohunga nomakondero wovandu omanene. Oviuṋe mbi mavi ṱunu vi ku eṱe ndino? EKONDWA 10 Okresmesa notjikroise vi yenda vi kumwe? EKONDWA 11 Omatuwo wovatjevere nomahitiro wondjuwo ondjapuke Esekiel mbya muna motjirimunikise, vya ri nomaheero wapeke kovakarere vaMukuru okuza kombura ndji 1914. EKONDWA 12 Ombeibela wina ya sasaneka ouhazendu ku nohange. Omena ratjike? Nu eziriro kepuriro ndi ma ri ṱunu vi kOvakriste ndino? EKONDWA 13 Ovapangure movyombanguriro ndino va yakura oumune wonongo yOmatwako, Gamaliel. EKONDWA 14 Ondatumisire onene ndje ya kOvahongonone vaJehova mena rokuhina okutoorora omunda ya isapewa i oviṋa mbyaatu ha undjire ko. EKONDWA 15 Ovakarere vaMukuru va rwira ousemba wawo wokukara nonḓuviro komatwako wOuhona waMukuru. EKONDWA 16 Matu yenene vi okumuna ouwa mozombongarero zetu zombongo? EKONDWA 17 Ozoskole zOuhona za vatera vi ovazuvarise vOuhona okuyenenisa oviungura vyawo? EKONDWA 18 Ovimariva vi za pi? Vi ungurisiwa vi? EKONDWA 19 Otuveze twomerikotameneno tu eta ondjozikiro ku Mukuru, posi yokutja eye u notjiṋa tjarwe tje vara pondondo yokombanda. EKONDWA 20 Matu tjiwa vi kutja oviungura vyokuvatera orupa rwoviungura oviyapuke ku Jehova? EKONDWA 21 Ove mo yenene okurirongerisa nai kovita vyaArmagedon. EKONDWA 22 Mo yenene vi okukara nongamburiro kutja omakwizikiro waJehova maye yenenisiwa?

Okuzambotjiwasuvera omundu konoo ihamisa konoo zepa konoo vaka, konoo nanukirwako kotjina tjitjiheri otjoe tjomukwenu, orondu tjandje ove uno rusuvero nomundu ngo, ove tjiwasuvera omundu uu uri purira kuye ukara noo kuvanga okutjiwa kutja nai hapo mukwetu tjimatjiti nai poo tjehina kutjita nai ami tjimbihina kuripurirako ami tjimbihina kuvatera poo tjimbihina kupura ongena tjandje ove wasuvera omundu ngo movanga okutjiwa kutja nai moruveze ndwi omukwetu ngumbitja mbauvera matuurungire motjikena poo poo poo unouzeu wae poo meenene okumuvateravi handje ove omundu ngwasuvera, okutja orusuvero nuu poo tjiuno rusuvero uriri otjina otjitenga tenga orusuvero move omuni mena rokutja kuza nai tjiuherisuvera omuni uriri kanaa apeya osuvere omundu warwe uriri uri omundu wopopezu naove, tjarwe otjitjakwao mutu tjimbimuna kutja nai oundu ouni oundu ouni otjikena ami mbimuna kutja oundu ouni poo vikanena mbimoso kukarara mbimaviso kukara move omuni kutja uri vare kutja oove omundu, uso kukara noo nomutima penombo rokutja tjiri tjiri omundu ngo mutu kena mbindu komutima uriri mutu nambano hitje uso kukara nombindu komutima, mbivanga ovandu mbenombindu komutima mena rokutja tjiuno mbindu komutima konoo vina ovivi nu mavi mavikuu mavi mavi kurama uriri kamaavimbimbasana naove.

OVIUTWA VI TU HONGA TJIKE? Oiri ondenga okanatje tji ka zu nokukwatwa, oruveze orunanḓengu tjinene rwomarundurukiro. Ongwaye tji matu tja nao? Mena rokutja ovakazendu mbe kurisa ombwaneno ku nounatje wawo moruveze orunanḓengu ndwi, ve vatera kutja ounatje wawo u kure nawa. * Otjikeṋa tji tji hinga ovakazendu okuyandja orusuvero nokutjevera ounatje wawo nawa nao? Oprofesa yena Jeannette Crenshaw, ya kahurura membo ndi The Journal of Perinatal Education kutja omukazendu tja zu nokupanduka, ohormone ndji isanewa oxytocin i “kurisa orusuvero momukazendu kokanatje ke otja tji me keṱunu, tji me ketara na tji me kenyamisisa.” Pe nohormone yarwe ndji kara po oruveze ndwi, ndji “vatera omukazendu okuraisa onḓero mokanatje ke” nu i vatera kutja ma hungire ku nokanatje ke nokunyanda kuna ko. Ongwaye tje ri otjiṋa otjinanḓengu? Ombwaneno ndji ri pokati komukazendu nokanatje ke, otjiṋa tji tja ungurwa i Jehova Mukuru, Omuute wetu omunarusuvero. * Ombara David ya tja Mukuru ongwe mu isa ‘mezumo raina’ nokutja ongwe mu nyamisisa komavere wa ina nokuhinooma. Eye wa kumba na tja: “Ami mba kara mondjamo yoye okuza kongwatero yandje, nokuza mezumo ramama Ove oOve Ndjambi wandje.”—Epsalme 22:9, 10. RIPURIRA KU IMBI: Ndovazu Mukuru we tu ungura momuano omuhimise otja imbwi kokutja omukazendu ma yenene okutjevera okanatje ke nokukepa ombango, hapo katji nokuraisa kutja Mukuru wina u yandja ombango kweṱe kourike wetu, “eṱe tjinga atu ri orukwato rwa Ndjambi”?—Oviungura 17:29. OMBEIBELA I TU HONGA TJIKE OHUNGA NONḒERO YA MUKURU MWEṰE? Jesus Kristus ngu tjiwa Omuute nawa pweṱe atuhe, wa tja: “Ozondjandja mbari kaze randwa kosenta imwe are? Nungwari kape na imwe yazo ndji mai wire pehi, Iho e hi nokuvanga nao. Nu wina inḓa ozondjise zoviuru vyeṋu azehe za varwa. Otji mu ha sokutira; oweṋe ovananḓengu tjinene pozondjandja ozengi!”—Mateus 10:29-31. Kavandu ovengi mbe yandja ombango kokazera akehe ku va munu, poo nandarire mbe muna kemwe kawo tji make wire pehi. Posi yokutja Tate wetu womeyuru u muna akehe kawo! Nu ouzera, nandarire mouingi wawo, kaunanḓengu ku ye povandu. Okutja, otjiṋa tji matu rihongere ko otjohi: ‘Otji u ha sokutira’ poo okumuna kutja Mukuru kayandja ombango kove. Nungwari tjiwa kutja eye u nonḓero tjinene move! Mukuru u nonḓero tjinene mweṱe nu u tu tjevera norusuvero Omatjangwa maye tu pe ongamburiro ndji “AMI EE MUNU KUTJA JEHOVA KEE NDJI SUVERA” Mape ya aku eta omarundurukiro mehupo retu tji twa tjiwa kutja Mukuru tjiri u nakonatja na eṱe, nokutja u yandja ombango kweṱe nonḓero yatjiri? Ii, maku yenene okueta omarundurukiro omanene, otja Hannah, * ngwa za koEngland tja kahurura: “Povikando ovingi tjinene, ami ee munu kutja Jehova kee ndji suvera, nokutja ozongumbiro zandje kaaze zuvirwa. Ami ee munu kutja ya ri mena rokutja hi nongamburiro. Ee munu kutja ee verwa, poo kutja Jehova kaa yandja ombango kwami mena rokutja hiwami omunanḓengu ku ye. Ee munu kutja Mukuru kari nakonatja na ami.” Posi yokutja, Hannah nai kakeyakeya kutja Jehova ke nonḓero mu ye nokutja kee mu suvera. Otjikeṋa tji tja eta omarundurukiro nga? Eye wa tja: “Omarundurukiro nga ya kambura orure. Mbi zemburuka ehungi rOmbeibela ohunga nombunguhiro ya Jesus nda yandjwa ozombura ozengi nḓa kapita. Oro re ndji ṱuna tjinene, nu re ndji vatera okukara nongamburiro kutja Jehova we ndji suvera. Nu ozongumbiro zandje tji za zirwa, ami aruhe ee riri, orondu mba uta okumuna kutja Jehova nangwari we ndji suvera. Mena rokutja ee konḓonona Ombeibela nokukara pozombongarero zombongo ami mbe rihonga ovingi ohunga na Jehova, ovikaṋena vye, noumune mbwe na wo ohunga na eṱe. Nai mbi muna oukahu kutja Jehova u ndji vatera, nokutja we tu suvera nu u nonḓero yokutjevera auhe wetu kourike we.” Oviṋa Hannah mbi ma hungire oviyanḓiparise tjinene. Posi yokutja, hapo mo yenene vi okukara nongamburiro kutja Mukuru u tjiwa omauzeu woye nongaro yomutima woye? Orupa ndu maru kongorere ko maru kahurura epuriro ndi. ^ par. 3 Mape ya aku rire ouzeu kovakazendu tjiva mbe kara nombameno tji va zu nokupanduka (ondumbo), okukara nombwaneno ndjo ku nounatje wawo. Posi yokutja ave rivere oveni tji ve ri mongaro ndjo. Otja ko-National Institute of Mental Health ya Amerika, ongaro yombameno otja indji peya ai etwa i omazeu morutu na momuinyo, nungwari kamena rotjiṋa omukazendu tje tjita poo tje ha tjiti. Tji mo vanga ondjivisiro yokomurungu ohunga nepu ndi, lesa orupa ndwi, “Understanding Postpartum Depression” mokambo nga o-Awake! komayuva 8 ku Juni, 2003. ^ par. 15 Omana tjiva motupa twi ya rundururwa.

Oondi tjitwautu okutunduuza rukuru omuti ngatupete rukuru ngunda auri omutaazu tjiwakwata mauketuura okutja omwatje ngatuutire pomwatje ingo mutiti okuhonga eraka kapena ouzeu kapena tjina tjimopandjara omwatje tjatjiwa eraka inde rwee nawa kanaa urwa okuhungira eraka indi rovandu varwe ami eraka mbeekutjakanena mbekurihonga uriri mounene posia eemunu kutjavii tjiu tjiuno mbango konoo tjiwa kutja motjiwa eraka rotjingirisa indi orwee oheritjiwa okutja mokarira omundu ngumwenene okupa kehi yovandu varwe nu ovandu mbo tjimavekotoka rukwao tjivatja mavekotoka vekuu kutwako ndatumisire ndjitwari nayo maveenene okukamburwa oupupu orondu una imbyo vyao avihe mbiunavyo kuza kombazu ngatu keraka.

I Charles Tjatindi OTJOMUISE Oruuma rwatuima ovanarupa peke peke mOviritje tjivautu okuvara omayuva ngasewako okuva za keyuva enene mo makuruhungi wOviritje tji mavehara ozondjambi. Omayandjero wozondjambi inga ngeri tjiyeri 3 ku Tjikukutu, mayetua poruhaera ondoneno yovanarupa mOviritje omakaendero wombura indji. Mozondjambi inda wina muna ozondjambi zoupandi orupa ovandu peke peke nduvakara naro momekurisiro kutja omo ndunino yotjiwana nombwiko nawina ombazu, pu mavezemburukwa. Omunane wOmanyomokisiro nOmatjivisiro wonganda indji o Pekepena, Abed Nakalenga, matja ozondjambi inda zatjitirwa okuzemburuka ondengu Oviritje mbivyaweza kotjitamba tjo mizumbi otjorupa rumwe romizumbi ndusurumuka. “Katjotjiri Oviritje vye surumuka tjimuna omayova. Tuamuna kutja tuasere okuzemburuka ongondjero indji nozondjambi kovanarupa.” Pongurova yozondjambi indji tjingetjo ovatone va Namibia vovihumba va katjoruhonga mavenyanukisa ovaenda nu wina mapekara ozonyose zomanyando, ovanyomokise womizumbi vouye, ovyuru vyozo ngetjeva novameme vovina. Nandarire kutja ovakuramenepo vo Pekepena kave vangere okuraisa kutja ovayandje vozongombe oo une, vatja muwo muna ovayandja vondunge motjitamba tjomizumbi nawina ovaimbure ovakuru. Mokuyandja ozongombe makutarewa komeriworonganisiro, omuzura womuzumbi, omwano oumuzumbi peke peke mbu maukongorerasana mobonronganeno yawo nawina kombuze youmuzumbi. “Matuvanga kutja tuye novaimbure mberiwo katjotjiri. Munao otjeri ohepero okukara novinenge peke peke ku ma kuyandjerwa ozongombe,” Nakalenga matja. Ozondjambi mazeyandjerwa kovito o 20 mumuna Omuyenda Motjitamba wombura, Omwiimbure Kourike we wombura, Ovaimbure Pamwe vombura nOmupunde wombura, muvyarwe ovingi. Ondjambi yongurova oyondjo yOmwiimbure wombura omutaare mu ma yakura o N$5000, ongombe ondendu o Brahman nondjambi yokukasuva yovandu vevari koruveze ngunda ndu hiya tjiukisiwa. Mbaurikwa motjito ihi Ovikango mena rokamuzumbi kao inga Ali, o Pouua na Delilah, Okazera na Skuturu, o Millennium na Tjiuana, Kakazona Kavari na Owee Nependa na Tjitjekura no kazumbi kao inga Ombunda. Otjitjitua ihi tja yenenisiwa nombatero nonganda yomahundju indji o Diaz. Matjikara ponganda yomasekiriro wovayenda o Safari Hotel nu matjiutu mo hamboumwe yomapeta. Oukarata mbuheri wo kovitiha maukosa N$100 nu imbwi wokovitiha o N$300 puna omariro. Oukarata mauvazewa ponganda orandise yomizumbu indji o Universal Sounds momurari imbwi o Post Mall nawina pOstora yOviritje mOrundjai rOvaherero.

Ospana jotjimbere Arsenal ospana jovaingiriza jokombanda ndjatura mo Highbury,London,ndjinjanda mo mahore jotjimbere tjovaingiriza tjokombanda.Ospana ojo jataara omakopi omurongo nambari jekopi rokehi FA,omakopi omurongo naetatu jekopi rokombanda enene,omakopi omurongo najane jorukondua,ekopi rimue kuna ozospana zomahi jarue najarue omengi noho. Arsenal Football Club is an English professional football club based in Highbury, London, that plays in the Premier League, the top flight of English football. The club has won 12 FA Cups, a joint-record, 13 League titles, two League Cups, 14 FA Community Shields, one UEFA Cup Winners' Cup and one Inter-Cities Fairs Cup.

Iyaa orondu indo rusuvero kombanda ehi ndi oruhena oo otjina tjarwe omahongero omundu tjiwahongwa upaturuka utjiwaa ovinenge ovingi otja tjimavikaondja mouye wina uyenena okuyandja ozondunge uyenena okuyandja omasa ketundu rwee tjirahongwa mena rokutja o ami mbimuna kokutja ovandu tjinga vahongwa amuhe metundu muyandjasana omasa wokukaondja komurungu ovandu kundinondi vemuna kutja o etundu roriva ratumba posia kautumbe porwao, omahongero orondu omundu tjahongwa mwenene okumuna oviungura ovisemba nu tjiwamunu oviungura ovisemba nu tjiwamunu oviunguraovisemba mamuyenene okuvaterasana okupasana okuwoko kohauzeu nngamwa ouzeu mbwemukovere ngamwa tjitjitwa tjitjemukuramene iyaa.

Etiku Mariryama Komurungu? I Kae Matundu-Tjiparuro OTJOMUISE – Ngunda omu-hoko amaurongere okuyenda kOtjipaue okukazemburuka muvyarwe Ovita vya Tjimbing-we vyo, ohoromende ya Nami-bia noyo Vandoitji tjandje za-haama mazehungirire ko “Tji-ungura Tjapeke” otaj rimwe romapu porutuu rondeto yo-mapu omahungirirwa pomatia-saneno pokati kohoromende ya Namibia noyo Vandoitji motji-huro ohongora tja Namibia Oritjatatu na Ritjaine. Mongondjero yOvamban-deru nOvaherero kutja om-bindu yo vati vao ndjatirahiwa iyovimbumba vyovarwe vyo-horomende yohuurire yo Van-doitji ngaisutue, ohoromende yOvandoitji yauta okurirya omainya. Ovaherero nOvam-banderu tjivazemburuka ozo-mbura esere zOtjitiro tjao Otji-ndjandja mo 2004 mouparanga wehi ngaa ko Tjauana na Uniona, mokurirya omainya Ohoromende yOvandoitji otji-ya hinda o Ministera yOme-kurisiro mOmbwiko nOmau-nguriro Wakumwe, Heidemarie Wieczorke-Zeul, komazembu-rukiro ngari mOkararara tjiyari 14 ku Katjose mo 2004. Okukoza otjimbi tjOtjitiro Otjindjandja tjOvambanderu nOvaherero nai tjitja kavaza ovyombanguriro vyo ko-mbanda mbanda movihuro o New York no New Jersey mOmahi Omakutasane wa America, Ovandoitji opuveera kundinondi tjitjee kutjiukwa otjo “Tjiungura Tjapeke”. Komurungu wa nai pakara oviroranganga imba na mbena vyo kukoza otjivepo tjombindu yomuhoko tjitjahinga momu-hoko. Tjimwe tjavyo yari o German-Namibia Institute for Reconciliation and Development (Orutu rwa Namibia nOvandoitji Rondjesirasaneno nOmekurisiro) kongotue yaro kukwari ovahonge Zephania Kameeta na Reinhard Keding. Kapena ongahukiro kutja ku-ndinondi orutu indui rua kaya-ndera pi? Pokati imbo o Ministera Wieczorek-Zeul nokuhina oku-zemburuka ovanane vomihoko poo ohoromende ya Namibia, wapurukuta araisa kutja oho-romende yOvandoitji yakwi-zika ozondola za Namibia oma-ngete e 160 tjimaiyandja komekurisiro womihoke avihe mbya hahaurwa iyohuurire yayo movita vyo 1904-8. Omuhoko wOvaherero nOvambanderu wapandera pokutja kauya puka utjiwa kutja upaha tjike nu tjiupaha otjisuta tjombindu watjo ndja-tirahisiwa iyeraa ra von Trotha ngwatjere omuhoko ngauya-ndekwe. Tjiri otji patjitua otjingi tjomuhoko auzengi. Ohoromende yOvandoitji tjiyauta netiku rayo motjisuta tjombindi tjinga ayauta okurora otjiwana no u mborokokotua, ovengi momuhoko vauta oku-himwa kutja tjii hapo ondjesiro Wieczorek-Zeul ndjaningira mOkakarara yari komutima tjiri? Omokutja ngunda ayasere kutja yeya kotjihungiriro kuna omuhoko oyo yauta netuku randino ndjimaitjiukua otjo “ndjesirasaneno” muhuka airier otjiungura tjapeke puye kurari-sira otjina ihi ndinondi otja komeero woruhindo rwOva-ndoitji nduari mehi otjiveke ihi. “Orondu tjiyahaama noku-hina kurivangera na ihungire ohunga no vakuramene po vOvaherero okuhungirira ko-tjiusuta tjao. Kapena tjarwe pendje naihi tjima kovisa oru-tanga nduripi na roruyaveze rOvaherero. Marire nawa ku avehe mbena orupe ohoromende yOvandoitji navarwe tjiva yakura kutja imbwii oo watjiri mburipo,” uwme wo vanan-djerera momuhoko, ohahende Vekuii Rukoro waraisa nao ombura ndjazuko mOkahand-ja tjahungirira ketiku roho-romende yOvandoitji. “Ngapezuvake nawa kutja ozondola za Namibia omangete o 160 zondjesirasaneno kazena orupe kaparukaze notjisuta tjombindi,” Ombara,Otjitambi yOvaherero watja nao mu Tji-tarazu ombura ndjazuko tjatja ndoondoo kotjiuru tjehi kutja ka naa tja kurungisiwa iyoho-romende yOvandoitji okutua omuwne kembo kotjimariva tjitjikuza otjondjeserasaneno tja karyangere ehi rOvandoitji. “Okomiti yOtjitiro Otjindja-ndja tjo Vaherero ma iri kwam-ba kongurameno yombonga-rero ya Kararara yOvaherero ndjari mu Seninarindi tjiyari yane na yetano. Yaire kumwe nokuhina omapitasaneno na ikutu ongutiro yoku nakaura omatiku wohoromende yOva-ndoitji ngakutjirwa onguyu yo ‘Tjiungura Tjapeke'”, Okomiti yOtjitiro Otjindjandja Tjovahe-rero yaraisire nao pombonga-rero yozombuze Omandaha. Munao omuhoko otji mawuu-ndju nozongama kutja ombona-grero ya Namibia nOvandoitji mai kwata tjike tjinene nene motjina tjotjisuta tjombindu yawo.

TARA komuengeli ngo ngwa yezurura omuvero wondeko. Ovarumendu eye mbu ma kutura ovaapostele vaJesus. Indjeye tu konḓonone kutja otjikwaye tji tja tjita kutja ve tuwe mondeko. Okaruveze okasupi uriri ombepo ondjapuke tji ya za nokutirirwa kovahongewa vaJesus, Petrus na Johanes va ya omutenya umwe kondembeli mu Jerusalem. Ingo, popezu nomuvero, pa ri omurumendu ngwa remanene oure womuinyo we. Ovandu eyuva arihe aave mu eta ngwi kutja me yekuningira ovimariva ku imba mbu mbaave ya kondembeli. Indu eye tja muna Petrus na Johanes, eye we riheka ku wo kutja ve mu pe otjiṋa. Ovaapostele va tjita tjike? Owo va kurama nave tara komurumendu. Petrus arire tja tja: ‘Ovimariva hi na vyo nungwari me ku pe otjiṋa tji mbi natjo. Mena raJesus, sekama u kawondje!’ Okuzambo Petrus wa kambura omurumendu kokuwoko okunene, nu tjimanga eye wa tuka peyuru na utu okukayenda. Ovandu tji va muna otjiṋa hi, owo va temenwe nu va ri nenyando ohunga notjikumise otjiwa hi. Petrus arire tja tja: ‘Otjikumise hi eṱe twe tji tjiti nomasa waMukuru, ngwa pendura Jesus movakoke.’ Ngunda eye na Johanes amave hungire, ovanane vozongamburiro ve ya mbo. Owo va pindika mena rokutja Petrus na Johanes aave raere ovandu ohunga na Jesus ngwa pendurwa movakoke. Okutja owo arire tji ve ve kambura nave ve twa mondeko. Meyuva ekongorerwa ovanane vozongamburiro va ri nombongarero onene. Owo va isanisa Petrus na Johanes na wina omurumendu owo ngu va verukisa. Ovanane vozongamburiro va pura nave tja: ‘Otjiṋa hi mwe tji tjiti nomasa watjike?’ Petrus we ve raera kutja ve tji tjiti nomasa waMukuru, ngwa pendura Jesus movakoke. Ovapristeri kaave tjiwa kutja ngave tjite vi, mena rokutja owo kaave yenene okupataṋa kutja otjikumise otjiwa hi tjiri tja tjitwa. Okutja owo va rakiza ovaapostele kutja ave ha hungire rukwao ohunga na Jesus, nu okuzambo ave ve esa ve yende. Otja omayuva tjaaye kayenda ovaapostele va kayenda komurungu okuzuvarisa ohunga na Jesus nokuverukisa ovavere. Ombuze ohunga novikumise mbi ya handjauka. Okutja nandarire ovimbumba vyovandu okuza kovihuro ongondoroka na Jerusalem va eta ovavere kovaapostele okuverukisa. Ihi tja tjita kutja ovanane vozongamburiro ve ṱe eruru, okutja owo va kambura ovaapostele nave ve twa mondeko. Nowo kave na puva kara mo oruveze orure. Mokati kouuku omuengeli waMukuru wa paturura omuvero wondeko, otja tji mo munu mba. Omuengeli arire tja tja: ‘Twendeye nu kakurameye mondembeli, nu mu kayende komurungu okuhungira ku novandu.’ Mependukirwa raindo, ovanane vozongamburiro tji va hinda ovarumendu kondeko okukaeta ovaapostele, owo kave vazere mo omundu. Kombunda ovarumendu ve kevevaza amave hongo mondembeli nave ve eta ketuwo rOtjira tjOvajuda. Ovanane vozongamburiro arire tji va tja ku wo: ‘Eṱe twe mu rakiza oukukutu kutja amu ha hongo mena ra Jesus rukwao. Nungwari eṋe mwe urisa Jerusalem nomahongero weṋu.’ Ovaapostele va zira nave tja: ‘Eṱe matu sokukara nonḓuviro ku Mukuru komeho wokukara nonḓuviro kovandu.’ Okutja owo va kayenda komurungu okuhonga “ombuze ombwa.” Ihi katjihorera otjiwa nao kweṱe okukongorera? Oviungura ekondwa 3 ngandu kekondwa 5. Omapuriro - Petrus na Johanes va tjitwa tjike omutenya umwe owo tjaave hiti mondembeli? - Petrus wa tja tjike komurumendu ngwa remanene, nu we mu pa tjike tji tja ri nonḓengu kombanda yovimariva? - Omena ratjike ovanane vozongamburiro tji va pindikire, nowo va tjita tjike ku Petrus na Johanes? - Petrus wa tja tjike kovanane vozongamburiro, nu ovanane vozongamburiro ve ve rakiza kutja ave ha tjiti tjike? - Omena ratjike ovanane vozongamburiro tjaave ṱeruru, nungwari pa tjitwa tjike indu ovaapostele tji va tuwa mondeko otjikando otjitjavari? - Ovaapostele va zira kutja vi indu tji va etwa ketuwo rOtjira tjOvajuda? Omapuriro omaweziwa - Lesa Oviungura 3:1-10. Nandarire kutja eṱe ndino katu ya pewa omasa wokutjita ovikumise, omambo waPetrus mOviungura 3:6 maye tu vatere vi okumuna ounanḓengu wombuze yOuhona? (Joh.17:3; 2 Kor. 5:18-20; Fil.3:8) - Lesa Oviungura 4:1-31. Indu tji matu munu omapirukiro moviungura vyokuzuvarisa, omomuano uṋe mu matu sokuhorera Ovakriste ovakwetu veserewondo etenga? (Oviung. 4:29, 31; Ef. 6:18-20; 1 Tes. 2:2) - Lesa Oviungura 5:17-42. Ovandu tjiva mbe he ri Ovahongonone, voruveze orukuru navoruveze rwetu, va raisa vi oumune ouwa ohunga noviungura vyokuzuvarisa? (Oviung. 5: 34-39)

Otjomuise- Ovivarero vio vandu mbu ma vemunika omutjise wo Covid-19 oupe mouparanga wehi ma vi rondereko eyepa yuva tjinga Oritjatatu ovandu avehe kumwe mehi o 2075 ava munikire omutjise imbwi. Ovivarero imbi vyarondere no vandu avehe kumwe o 869 okuza ko vandu avehe kumwe mouparanga wevi o 1206 mbamunikire omutjise imbwi Oritjavari ngunda Omandaha ovandu mba munikire omutjise imbwi oupe avari o 726 pu ma pehee kutja okuza kOmandaha okuyenda koritjavari ovivarero vya rondere novandu o 480. Orukondua rwa Khomasa ondu ma ru raisa omarondero wo vi varero vyo vanmdu mbu ma ve munika omutjise imbwi oupe Oritjatatu movandu avehe kumwe mehi o 2075 o Khomasa mukari no vandu o 1128, nderi ozoperesende o 54 zo vavere ovape mehi arihe mberi mo Khomasa akeerike, nu mOtjomuise. Ko Tjomuise movihuro vio vi varero vio kombanda mbanda ma ku hondjo Okahandja Oritjavari Otjomuise tjari no vi varero ovipe vio 359 nu Omandaha o 281 mbiri ogahukiro kutja eyuva arihe ovivarero ma vi yerurukireko mOtjomuise. Kutjo movihuro vio vi varero vio kombanda mbanda ma ku kongorere otjihuro tja Kahandja Oritjatatu tji tjari no 92, no Tjomejamomutumba mOrukondwa rwa Hardapa Oritjatatu tji tjari no 81. Ongaro indji ondja yetere ko kutja oure woviveke vivari omayninganyingiro muvio, kutja okupita poo okuhita, yengunda aya patwa, pendje naindu tjeri ohepero kutja okuvasisa ovihepwa ko tjiwaøa, poo omena rouvere ouzeu Otjiuru tjEhi, Hage Geingoba, otja tjatjivisire Oritjavari. Tjingetjo nai wina omahongero movihuro imbi nai yangunda aya handwa nganduu tjiveke tji ma tjiyende owo ayehe mehi tji ma yepata tjiyeri 25 ku Ngarano nganduu 25 ku Suramazeva, oure wo mweze ko ma suviro wo ku pepera.

BERLIN Nguari omukuramenepo wa Namibia kehi rOvandoitji, Peter Katjavivi, nai nguri Otjiuru tjOtjirata tjEhi tjOzondiero zOmekurisiro, Onongo Peter Katjavivi, maningire kutja ozonganda zomahongero wokombanda mehi rOvandoitji zekotore ovikongo vovyuru omirongo kaatjondumba mbiri omatupa wOvaherero mbata mOtjitiro Otjindjandja nai mbiri motuveze tuomapwikiro wovina vyomakuruhungi mehi indo. Omapitisiro wo TV indji o ARD mehi indo, Omandaha yapitisre kutja ovikongo imbi vyatuarewa kehi rOvandoitji mOtjitiro Otjindjandja tjozombura inda o 1904 kutja kukatjitirwe ongondononeno yokuraisa kutja ovavapa venondengu po vazoozu. O TV indji yaraisire kutja ovikongo vyovyuru o 47 ngamba viri pOnganda yOmatiziro wOvyune vyOmakuruhungi ponamiti yomahongero ponganda yomahongero wokombanda o Freiburg mo Berlina mehi rOvandoitji. “Otja konduvasaneno yo Unesco, ovina imbi vyasere okuyarurwa kehi kuvyaziriire,” Katjavivi waraerere o TV indji. “Tuna otutu mo Namibia tu maturiyandjere okuyakura otjiungura otjinahepero ihi.” Katjavivi watjere omatupa inga omanandengu tjinene kovature va Namibia. “Otjina tjokukotora ondengu nomakuruhungi wetu. Otjina harukuru tjokukotora ovikongo imbi kutja vipewe ombakero ndjevipwire,” watjere.”Kakutja tuna onyaho. Okoo kutja ovina mavirihungirire ovini. Tjitjasewapo ehi rOvandoitji no Namibia okutara motjina ihi moupore kutja tutjite otjina tjitjiritjo moruveze nduriro.” Omutjange wo TV indji, Markus Fenzel, watjere mapeya apekara omatupa warwe wOvaherero mozonganda zomapwikiro wovina vyomakuruhungi mehi rOvandoitji. “Petataimbwa kutja pena ovikongo vyovyuru vyOvaherero tjiviri ovititi o 300 mbyatuarewa kehi rOvandoitji meserewondo oritja mirongo vivari,” Frenzel waraerere onganda yozombuze indji o AFP yehi rOvandoitji. Ovatize vovinenge vyo makuruhungi vonganda yomahongero wokombanda yehi rOvandoitji indji kanaa yapatanisire omatupa inga o ARD tjiyevepurire. “Omaworonganisiro wombazu,” Otjiuru tjonganda yombiwkiro indji, Dieter Speck, watjere. Katjavivi matja watanda okuzengurura otjina ihi moupore.”Mezeri kutja otutu itui matuungura kunaete. Matuvanga okuungura otjiungra ihi otjomapanga. Metjiwa kutja ehi rOvandoitji atjaritjita nao wina ndoovazu rari novina vyaro mbyatoorerwe moruve roharive indo,” watjere. Omuyozikwa mo Ministeri yOviposa vyOpendje wapandere okuhungirira kotjia ihi natja “nai katuyarora okuyakura omaningiriro kaani kotjiveta okuza komauhonapare wa Namibia”. Ovaherero vauta nombiririro yOvanane vohuurire vOvandoitji mu Rozondu mo 1904 tjivapinndikisiwa iyourunga wovahandurisiwa vOvandoitji wehi rao, ovinamwinyo novakazendu vao navezepa ovahandure vOvandoitji va kauriri ape o 200 moure womayuva. Ovahuure vOvandoitji vazirira kotjina ihi nokuhina ombindu komutima navetaara Ovaherero motjirwa otjiseinina tjitjakarako kombunda mo 1904 komanene weyuva okupikira koutjiro wa Tjomuise. Otjirwa ihi tja kongorerwa “iyEraa rOmayandekero” ro Ngenerara Lothar von Trotha ngwari kehi ohunga kehi yomuyandjambo Okaisera Wilhelm II mo Berlina. Oruveze indo Ovaherero vari notjivarero tjitjiri pokati ko 50,000 no 80,000. Penunungwa kutja omayovi omasere vaturikwa komiti nu orukosi rOtjitiro Otjindjandja itji tjimarukayanda mo 1907 tjandje Ovaherero vasewa ovandu o 15,000 uriri. Ovatjiwe vomakuruhungi ovengi vetja itji otji tjari Otjitiro Otjindjandja otjitenga tjeserowondo oritja 20. O Ministera yehi rOvandoitji yOmekurisiro wOmahi wOpendje, Heidemarie Wieczorek-Zeul, waraisa omwiihamwatima wehi re kotjitiro tjOvaherero povijtitua vyokuzemburuka ozombura esere zotjitiro ihi mo 2004.-Nampa-AFP

Pahara oku kara ongendo mo tjiwaøa kombunda yo nÿiro, ombura ndjazuko, yo nongo yo mbazu, Jarimbovandu Alexander Kaputu, kutja ombazu ma i koka omurise wayo tje heriko rukwao. Posia otjo tjiri peÞa mbanÿe ape yaruka mbanÿe . Nai muno' mitanda mbia pendukira ombazu no ma sembamisiro wo vitjitwa peke peke. Omutjise wo Corona tjiwa ngara wa pupavara, pa kara ovitjitwa peke peke vio mbazu. Ombura ndjazuko po ndanda yo nganda yo ma hongero wo kombanda, indji o University of Namibia mo Khomasdal, pari tjomukandi oku raisa omukandi wo rukupo mo mbazu. Ombura indji po sikore ya Erosa yo mbutiro mu Tengarindi pari omahore wo tjimbere wo viwondo nu porutjandja ro tjimbere rwa Khomsdala tjingetjo mu Seninarindi pari omazemburukiro wo nÿiro yo muyaruke Kaputu, mu viarwe ovingi onganga yo mbazu, Tjitavi Kambausuka, pa ungurire ounatje. Owo mbu puna oukwao mbwa twarewa ko tjivetero wina oruveze tjingero, wo tjiwondo tjoharive iho omwano mbu ma tjirukwa. Mombii indji Oroviungura otji pari omukandi wo ma yanda oku honga kutja omayanda ya ziriire pi nu yeheya tjike. Hapo ngunda pena oo Penandino ombazu ma ikozewa itjike? Rukero matja omundu auhe uno' ma yanda yetatu. Oraina omu mukwate; oraihe no raihe omunene ihe ya ihE, poo tjikuume we. Matja omayanda yena omihoko vivari vio ngura. Yoku kwiisamo oruhoze mo muÞirwa no ku muyorisa. Noyo vikuria kutja auhe ahari ovikuria ombiarara. Ohepero okoo kutja ovandu ve yanda rimwe ka ve yarukasana mo ru katuko.

Oupupu okurietera omauzeu mehupo mena roviṋa ovingi mbi tu riwongera. Tu hepa omasa noruveze okuranda oviṋa, okuvisuta, okuviungurisa, okuviṱiza mongaro osemba nokuvitjevera kutja avi ha vakwa. Jesus wa ri nehupo ndi hari noviṋa ovingi kutja ape ha kara otjiṋa tji matji mu isako ombango kotjiungura tjokuzuvarisa.—Mat 8:20. Ove mo yenene vi okukara nehupo ndi hi noviṋa ovingi kutja u yenene okuungura ovingi motjiungura tjokuzuvarisa? Tji mwa tjiti omarundurukiro, pe nomundu meṱunḓu reṋu ngu ma yenene okuuta okuungura otjomukandjira omukarere? Tjinangara nai u ungurira Jehova oruveze aruhe, hapo ove wa yandjera kutja omauini ye ete ouzeu mehupo roye kouṱiṱiṱiṱi? Okukara nehupo ndi hi noviṋa ovingi ngunda amo ungurire Jehova ku ku pa ondjoroka nu u kowa mu imbi mbi u na vyo.—1Tim 6:7-9. Tjanga oviṋa tjiva mbi mo vanga okukumbira.

Orwiihi ndwi uhepa okustamba orwiihi ndwi okutja okupaha otjina tjimatjiyenene oku oku okundereka orwiihi ndwi poo kunikizira orwiihi ndwi pehi iyaa oomwano wandje mutu mbumbizika orwiihi uriri. Tjarwe otjitjakwao ngahino tjimee tjimee tjimeziki orwiihi tjimbikondjisa okutjevera tjinene omuriro pendje naindo zominute kaani okukondja kutja nai ezuko rwee iriri kakombanda nu kakehi tjiungurisa ezuko tjimoziki konganda pomuriro ihepa kutja nai omuriro auha auharundu pupepatapi ukare nozongune ozombwa uriri orwiihi nao otjina tjitjimonoka tjimanga andii ngunda monangarasi tjiri watoora indo rondiru ndwaasuvera ndo ove nduurya ruhepa eho ropopezu noho. tjarwe otjitjakwao orwiihi nao oo otjina tjitjihepa ngunda monangarasi otjina tjitjiyarera nokuningirira tjimanga tjihepa okupya nawa noho mena rokutja konoo vanga okurya orwiihingunda amori orwiihi marukukaterere momayo, okutja otjina tjimbitjevara noho hivanga orwiihi ndukaterera momayo okutja oiri aihe mbii mbi mutu omazikiro mawa worwiihi atjaerira kutja tjiuno ruveze tjiri kaondi tjiunoruveze ove omuni tjimoziki otjikurya atjihe ngamwa uriri tjihepa eho ropopezu.

I Kae Matundu-Tjiparuro O MOTLHASEDI MAWORONGANENO oye tjaine yombura aihe wozo-ndekurona zOvaherero za South Africa yari momayuva womasuviro ngazuko. Kozondekurona zOva-herero mo South Africa kwe-ere okuye kurikwamba ozon-dekurona okuza ko Tjauana, ndeere puna omuhona wOva-herero mo Tjuana na South Africa, Kaumo Johannes Maharero, nawina ozondeku-rona za Namibia. Ombura ndjazuko ko Namibia kwazire ovandu vane uriri nombura indji otjivarero ihi tjakapitire ovandu omurongo tjitjiri otji-na tjitjatjatere ku Maharero. Nandarire kutja ovanane ovomuhoko okuza ko Nami-bia kutja ovomarapi poo ovo-mbazu kanaa vere kovitjitua imbi, otjimbumba tjitjeyere okuza ko Namibia tjinene omitanda mbyakaha, tjanya-ndjere omuria nomutjato naveyere otjivepo tjozonde-kurona za South Africa oku-muna mbazire kumwe okuza kokure ko Namibia. Omuzaro wotjiserandu wahonaparere motjirongo ihi. Kombunda wouyenda ape weyuva nohinga okutuurun-gira mo Tjauana outuku wa Ritjatano petjire o Rovyu-ngura otjimbumba tja Namibia otji tjawirire otji-rongo ihi motjirongo ihi. Imwe yozombokiza ndaziri-rire kOvaherero ndjakwa-terwa muno otji yatjirirwe amai tjuku tjukurisa ovaenda omeva otja kombazu. Tja-zumba otjimbumba tja Na-mibia otjitja karaisirirwe ozondendera maa muturire Ovaherero ngunda ave hiya-tua okuundurwa iyozomburu. Kombunda ya nao ovi-tjitua otjivyautire petuwo romerinaneno rotjiwana. Pomapatururiro wavyo pari ovahenendu peke peke tjimu-na o Ministera yOhoro-menede yOrukondua wina Okanepo kOndjuwo yOzo-veta yorukondua, Joe Mas-wanganyi, Omuhona wo Tji-rongo, Amos Seleka, Orata yOtjihuro ih o Lephalale, M. Mabote, Omutjangerepo wOmahongero nOmbazu mOmberoo yOmukurame-nepo wa Namibia mo South Africa, Selma Nghinamun-dova. Omuhonge Tuamanova-ndu Papo, ondekurona yOva-herero wapaturirire ovitjitua imbi nongumbiro tjazumba ape kongorere omaimburiro womahi ayeyetatu mumutura otjingi tjovaherero o Tjauana, South Africa na Namibia. Tjeere kembo Maswa-nganyi watjere omapizukiro wOvaherero ndinondi mo Namibia, o South Africa na Tjauana yaetua iyo ohuurire okuutira kombonagrero ya Berlina yo 1884 ova Europa tjiva hanasana ovirumatua vyovita. Watokere ova Africa okuzako okurimuna otjova-ture vomahi peke peke mo Africa natja indji kandjiri ombazu nungwari otjina tjitjaza momararakaneno wa Africa. Watjere Ovaherero varwisa omahaneno wa Africa wouhuura inga kuna ouhonapare wouhuura wOva-ndoitji no puvapizukira otja tjiva pizuka nai tjiva aa veekurira va South Africa. Wina ouhuura ombwayeta onyoneno kuwo ndjiri movi-perendero mbya harekere etuuo mumwari ovitjitua. Watjere oruveze tjingero Samuel Maharero tjaarwisa ouhuura wOvandoitji mo Namibia, Ombara Mosheshoe navarwe wina mo South Africa vapirura omakamburiro wehi rao iyo vahuure. Watjere kombunda yovirwa vyo mbi-ririro youhuura peya ozoho-romende zoninikizire motu-kondua otungi tua Africa. Ozohoromnde inda wina zanakaurwa namuzikamisiwa ozohoromende zouyara. Posio ozohoromende inda nai zetandua iyo ombangu you-muhoko mbwatia okunyona o Africa. Munao otjaningirire ova Africa avehe okuya pamwe nokukurama pamwe otjo va Africa nokuzemba oumuhoko wao. Waraisire kutja ohoromende ya Lim-popo maiyandja oruvara okuura kovitjitua kangamwa vyombazu vyo zondekorona zo Vaharero nezetoko kutja ngaze kaende komurungu novitjitua vyazo nokuhina kuteka ombango nandarire kutja ozo okambumba uriri. Ommbara Kaumo Maha-rero waningirire Ovaherero momahi wozongata wa South Africa na Tjauana okuhina okupupua iyo mipipo nung-wari vepahe omti mokati komipipo imbi mumave-handa. Watjere ozondekurona zOvaherero apehe puzeri kutja omo Tjauana poo o South Africa zasere okuritjiua kutja zazire pi. Tji zeritjiua kutja zazirepi otji mazeye-nene okutengwa iyomihoko vyarwe. Watjere omundu kanaa suvere eraka romurara-nganda ndoovazu eraka re omwini keri suverere. Oku-hina kuritjiuwa nokutjiwa eraka ojitjiyeta ombambau-kire yosaneno. Wa zembu-rukisire ozondekuroan zOva-herero ohepero yo makuru-hungi mokutja oyo yakunwa iyotjirwa tjombiririro you-huura nombindi nondiro yo vati ovoo vee kurira vomahi wozongata otja tjiveri nai. Mombinika ye ndjare-serwe i Seuakouje Kandjii, Ombara Otjitambi yOva-herero, Kuaima Riruako, wina waraisire ohepero yo maworanganeno inga natja nawo porwe ovandu ve ongu maveraisa nawo ombango yawo ondue okuzemburuka orukapita veze, okurihongera kuro kutja veritunge nuve-hupe. Watjere tjzara onguyu younane wayakura ourizirira wokutjevera ongaro vovitjitua vyovandu ve nombazu yao mombwiro nondero yome-kuisiro wao. Ihi, Riruako wayanisire kutja ihi otjiun-gura tji makaenda natjo ko-murungu kongaaruhe. “Otja tjitua worongana imba nga-turijaruke tuteze ongaro yetu otjo muhoko mongaro novi-tjitua no mombazu. Turimba okuzemburuka ovati vetu no-kupaha otjiyangapara nomasa kuwo otjovandu vombindu ndjayama ominyo vyetu, ” watjere. Omazemburukiro inga yari morukondua rwa Limpo-po mouhuura nduari ondimwa yombangu yozo-mburu nduaarutjiukua otjo Transvaal komanene oku-pikira kongurova. Mo 1907 Ombara Samuel Maharero novandu ve otjivee-kutura mozondjepo za Trans-vaal mofarama o Groen-fontein. Oveta Yehi yo 1913 tjiyeya yatjaera ovazoozu pendje nozoresevate oku-randa ehi kovavapa. Munao Ovaherero otji vaundurirwa komamuho kotuveze tjimuna o Nylstroom ndinondi nduri o Modimolle morukondua wina ndu marutjikwa otjo Waterberg. Varwe vakatura momahi wovazoozu tjimuna mo Nikara (Mokurunyane), Kaffirkraal (Kauletsi), Bosh-diesh (Motlhasedi) no Spe-culatie puva kapizukira mena rokutja oveta kaa iyandjere omatundu wovazoozu kam-banda ya yetano okutura pona pemwe. Maharero wakatura pozofarama inda: Wer-kendam, Witbank (D’nyala) no Oranjefontein mene yomukuro wondondu indji o Mokolo. Ovo ehi indi aa veri-sutu nokuungura. Ovaru-mendu vOvaherero 0 80, ovakazendu o 95 novanatje o 22 vaturire puna Maharero po Werkendam, Rietspruid, Wa-terkloof no Ellisras ndinondi tjitjiri o Lephalela. Ovaru-mendu mbumavevaza otjiva ro tjo 40 vaungura mozongo-poro mo Witswatersrand mOndundumehi kutja vekare momahi inga novinamwinyo vyao. Vari nozongombe o 560, oukambe o 12 nozondu nozongombe o 130. Mo 1922 Maharero otjayaruka ko Ma-halapye nakatira mo Serowe tjiyari 14 ku Tengarindi mo 1923.
Gobabisotjihuro tji tjiri koutjiro mo Namibia. Ozeu wo meja motjihuro tjapako.[1] References

Kombunda yombapitisimo yaJesus, ombepo ondjapuke ye mu twara mokuti onguza. Eye kena pa rya oure womayuva 40, nu eye wa ṱire ondjara tjinene. Okuzambo Satan we ya okuyekurora Jesus na tja ku ye: ‘Ove tji u ri Omuna waMukuru raera omawe nga kutja ye rire omboroto.’ Posiya Jesus we mu zira na tja: ‘Omatjangwa maye tja ove kohepa ovikurya uriri kokutja u hupe. Ove mo sokupuratena kembo arihe Muhona nda hungire.’ Rukwao, Satan wa rora Jesus na tja: ‘Tji u ri Omuna waMukuru tjiri, rurumina pehi okuza kombandambanda yOndjuwo Ondjapuke yaMuhona. Omatjangwa maye tja Muhona ma tumu ovaengeli ve okukuyakura.’ Posiya Jesus rukwao wa tja: ‘Omatjangwa maye tja ko nakurora ko Muhona.’ Okuzambo, Satan wa raisira Jesus omauhona aehe wouye nomautumbe nounene wayo na tja: ‘Ami me ku pe omauhona nga aehe nomaunene wawo indu tji we rikotamene ku ami rumwe uriri.’ Posiya Jesus wa zira na tja: ‘Za po, Satan! Omatjangwa maye tja rikotamena ku Muhona erike.’ Okuzambo Satan wa ya, nu ovaengeli ve ya nave yandja ovikurya ku Jesus kutja ma rye. Okuzambo, Jesus wa zuvarisa ombuze ombwa yOuhona. Imbyo ooviungura mbya hindirwa kombanda yehi. Ovandu va suverere oviṋa Jesus mbyee ve hongo, nu aave mu kongorere koṋa akuhe eye kaa i. “Tji ma kora ovizeze, u tjita imbi porwavyo mbye mu pwira, tjinga e ri omunavizeze ne ri ihe yovizeze avihe.”—Johanes 8:44

Jehova wa tja ku Moses: ‘Indjo kwami kondundu. Me tjanga omatwako wandje komawe 2 ne yandja kove.’ Moses wa ronda kondundu na kakara ngo omayuva nomauṱuku 40. Ngunda eri ngo, Jehova wa tjanga Omatwako 10 komawe 2 na yandja ku Moses. Kombunda yoruveze, Ovaisrael aave nangarasi Moses opuwo we vesa. Owo va tja ku Aron: ‘Matu vanga omundu ngu me tu hongorere. Tu ungurira omukuru!’ Aron wa tja ku wo: ‘Eteye ongoldo yeṋu.’ Eye wa zuzura ongoldo na ungura po ondana. Otjiwaṋa tja tja: ‘Ondana ndji eemukuru wetu ngwe tu pitisa moEngipte!’ Owo va uta okurikotamena kondana yongoldo, nave kara nomukandi omunene. Ihi tja ri otjiṋa otjivi po? Ii, mena rokutja otjiwaṋa tja tjita omakwizikiro wokutja matji rikotamene ku Jehova erike. Posiya otjo nai tja teya omakwizikiro ngo. Jehova wa muna oviṋa mbyaave tjiti, na raere Moses a tja: ‘Twende yaruka kotjiwaṋa. Owo kave nakupuratena kwami mave rikotamene ku mukuru woposyo.’ Moses wa heruka okuza kondundu, a handa omawe 2. Otja tji ma yende ama ryama popezu nozondanda, Moses otja zuva ovandu mbu mave imbura. Tjazumbo ookuvemuna tji mave pundu nokurikotamena kondana. Moses wa pindikire tjinene. Eye wa yumba omawe 2 nga ri na wo momake pehi naye nyanyauka. Eye wa hakahana okunyanyaura ondana yongoldo ndjo. Okuzambo wa pura Aron a tja: ‘Ovandu ve ku tjiti vi kutja u tjite otjiṋa otjivi nai?’ Aron wa tja: ‘O pindike. Mo tjiwa kutja otjiwaṋa hi tji ri vi. Owo aave vanga mukuru wawo nu otjimbakambura ongoldo yawo ezuzura nu amu piti ondana ndji!’ Aron kaa sokutja wa tjita otjiṋa tjo. Moses wa ronda rukwao kondundu nekeriheka ku Jehova kutja me ve isire. Jehova wa isira imba mba ri nonḓero yokupuratena ku ye. Mo munu nao kutja yari ounahepero pu pe ṱa pi kOvaisrael okupuratena ku Moses? “Tji wa tjiti omakwizikiro ku Ndjambi, ye yenenisa nokuhinokuwomba, orondu Ndjambi ke nonyuṋe momayova. Yenenisa omakwizikiro woye.”—Omuzuvarise 5:4

Julia Kamarenga Okamujenda-Orata onene mouhonapare wOmbazu wOmbanderu, KaÞiÞii Mbaeva, matja otjiihamsie kutja mo Namibia ekutuke munongaro ohazerwa ndjitjitwa kuwo. Mbaeva matja ape yarire kombanda yozombura o 21 tjivayetwa mofarama indji o Du Plessis (Okamujenda) mOkarukondua kOmatoorore ka Korukambe muvekara averaisira ozondjemeno zawo nungwari omungandjo uriri. OvaÞuta imba kavenohange nandimavetja eke etarazu rovanane vao. Oritjavari tjiyari 13 komweze imbwi owo vakayendere momivanda okuyenda komberoo yorata yokarukondua novimbakete kukwatjangwa omitjemo vyawo wawo tjiva ngaayetja “tusutisiwa o N$1000 ozongombe zetu tjimazeri motuhito”, navekayandja orutuu romitjemo komberoo indji. Orutuu indwi rwayakurirwe i Nisha Steenkampa, nguri omukawondjisa wovyungura momberoo indji wokombanda. Mozondjemeno nÿeri morutuu indwi ozo ndareserwe i Titus Ripanga Tjiuandu muzo mumuna kutja kavenomaryo. “Ohoromende ya Namibia okutuurungira mOminsiteri yOmatungururiro wOmahi yaeta omaÞunÿu ape o 45 okuza kwarwe mOmaheke okuye kungunda amavewama pokaruveze okatiti inga kunena ozoheketara 4100,” Tjiuandu matja. Otja kovaÞuta imba mavetja ehi eÞiÞi indi ndivapewa ovinamwinyo vyara vyakurura tjinga otjivarero tjawo atjineneparerako naihi tjovinamwinyi wina nu munao otjimavehepa ehi rarwe romaryo. Nandarire mouhepe wehi ovinamwinyo vyao tjivyari momahi omapatutuke tjimuna motuhito name¿e wozondjira, oporise ya Namibia ivesutisa. Omunane wozaziona yoporise, Amupolo, matja owo tjivetjita okutwa momaunguriro oveta otjovaungurirepo voveta.” Ezeva o 348 rOveta yOmatemba mOndjira nOmatenba yo 1999 ekahuke kutja omikeerari mbimaviso okutoorwa,” Amupolo matja nawezako kutja ozombongarero zondjivisiro zeehamisiwa kunotjiwana okukahurura ovi¿a posya ovatuta kaveyandjako ombakatwi. Ovatuta wina vakuminine ovatuta ovaapa vomahi wapeke mokukakmbura ozongombe zawo ndavazewa motuhito, nokuvesutisa o N$80 mongombe tjitjiri otjivarero tjitjiyeruruka okuza kotjivarero tjovinamwinyo mbyakatizirwa mofarama kangamwa yehi rapeke. Tjingetjo ovatuta mavekuminine ovaungure vo Ministeri yOmatungururiro wEhi kokutja vehandurisa omapanga nomihoko vyao uriri. Mavetja ozombura nozombura vetjita omaningiriro nu ngamba kaveyatona nu nandarire kaveraerwa kutja ongwaye kuwo tjikweheripuririrwe. *Julia Marenga omuungure wo Ministeri yOndjivisiro nOunongo wOmahakaenisiro nguungurira mEpako. I Kae Matundu-Tjiparuro OTJOMUISE Ozondekurona zOvaherero nOvambanderu okuza mouparanga wa South Africa nganduu ko Namibia na Tjauana omayuva womasuviro inga mazeundjirwa oku woronganena motjihuro o Lephalale. O Lephalale tjiri mOrukondua rwa Limpopo mo South Africa. Ozo mazezemburuka ozombura esere zomavazero yOmbara Otjitambi yOvaherero yoruveze rovita kuna Ovandoitji, Samuel Maharero, mehi indo.Otjirongo ihi ombura ndjazuko oku kwa kawirire Ombara yOngwatjindu omuyaruke David Kakmbazembi ngwari mouyenda wokuteza omatupa waihe omunene Ombara Kounjonua Kambazembi. Ombura indji o 1907 mokati Maharero otja kavaza mo South Africa eye nove mukongorere tjiva tjivaza no kuhuka omwinyo movita vyo 1904-1907 pokati kOvaherero Ovambanderu munda umwe nOvandoitji munda imbo warwe. Wina ovo vahuka era rokutja omuhoko wa kOuherero ngauyandekwe ndazuvarisiwa iyo Ongenerara Lothar von Trotha mo Namibia oruveze indo ndaa ritjiukwa otjo South West Africa. Von Trotha wari omuyandje wembo worupa rovita rOvandoitji. Eye kanaa wazuvarisa eraa indi uriri nungwari wina otjomunane worupa rovita weritua momaunguririo nokuhina ondjenda, ombindu komutina poo otjari. Mena re raa indi omuhoko oruveze indo mbwaa utataimbwa potjivaro o 80,000 okuwasanena tjiwarira orupyu uriri nu otja tji wa pizuka nai tjiva vakarira o voo Tjauana noo South Africa. Omazembukiro inga maye kaondja kehi yomambo omaomborore ngumayetja nai: ” Ozondambo ovakuru novati vetu nduvezesa kombunda mOrutjindo rOtjitiro tjao kanaa zezengi kaparukaze nu matu zeteza noku zekongorera nganduu kongaaruhe ….” Movimbumba mbi mavyundjirwa po mazemburukiro inga muna ozombara zOvaherero okuza mo Namibia na Tjauana, tjimuna Ombara Otjitambi yOvaherero Kuaima Riruako nOmbara Kaumo Maharero okuza ko Mahalapye ko Tjauana. Wina mapekara ovanene vohoromende yorukondua rwa Limpopo mumuna o ministera yorukondua yOmanyando nOvyombazu, Joyce Mashamba. Pendje nomahungi peke peke tjimuna omakamburiro ousupi wo makuruhungi iyonongo yo makuruhungi womuhoko, Jarimbovandu Kaputu na Venaete Tjivasera nawina ondimwa yovita vyo 1904-8 ndjina onongo Zed Ngavirue, tjarwe tjima tjimunika otja tjimwe tjovitjitua vyo mazemburukiro inga otjinene otja korutuu omairo kombongo kovarama indji o Werkendam. Ozonduna peke peke mu muna omutize wotjihuro ihi o Lephalale, Orata Mogothlane, maze katuapo oruzenga kozongungu zovati. O Werkendam iimwe yozavarama Ombara Maharero novandu ve ku vapizirwa okuza mo maturiro we omatenga mo South Africa, o Groenfontein ohoromende yohuurire mo South Africa oruveze indo tjiyazikamisa Oveta yEhi yo 1913. Oveta indji aa itjaere ovazorondu vetano no kombanda ya nao okutura movarama imwe. Ombara Maharero no tjiwana tje vatjinda mo Groenfontein na ve rimbara moupanranga worukondua rwa Transvaal aruhe tjinene koutjiro na komamuho . Oruveze indo wari nozongombe o 260, oukambe o 12 nozondu nozongopo azehe kumwe o 130. Ovaherero vaturire mo Werkendam nganduu mozombura inda ndu mazeutu nombura indji o 1990. Ozombura tjimazeende ama zekurupa eye wauta okwiihamenwa iyo konganda posya ouhonapare aupanda kutja makotoke. Okuzambo eye watjindira ko Tjauana ka katira mo Serowe tjiyari 14 ku Tengarindi mo 1923.

OTJOMUISE Ozondiro zomutjise wopolio nai mbwahandjuka mehi arihe zatjiti otjivaro tjo 22 okuza ko 17. Omutjangerepo Omuka-rerere wo Ministeri yOuve-ruke nOnduno yOtjiwana, Onganga Kalumbi Shangula, wa zeuparisire nao mehungi re kuna o Nampa Oritjatatu. Watjere kundinondi motu-kondua atuhe tuehi o 13 ko mauhonapare wouveruke kwatjivisiwa omaum-ba o 88 ngumaye tataimbwa kutja omutjise imbwi. Motjihuro ohongora mwatjivisirwe omaumba o 89 nu mOsha-kati o 38. Motjivaro ihi mwata ovandu o 22 nu o 78 aveisiwa iyo zonamiti. Posyo Shangula waraisire kutja o Ministeri ye ngunda kaiya zikamisa kutja omutjise imbwi weya vi mehi nungwari ozongon-dononeno zo kuuteza kuwaza zauta. “Opolio yamunikwa ozombura mbari ndakapita mo Tjauana na Angola nu nambano oyondji yeya mehi retu munao moruveze indui otjeri ouzeu okuhana kutja wazapi mena rokutja osaneno yawo kangwatera. Mauhakerwa mokuza ko India,” watjere. Waningire ovandu oku-hina kuuruma mena rokutja ohoromende inomikambo mbiyatoora okuutjurura. Watjere omata yarwe yamu-nikire kutja orukosi orutja-vari romahavarisiro womata mouparanga wehi arihe ndu marukara tjiyeri 8 nganduu 20 komweze imbwi, rurire ondoneno. Otjiveke tjitja-zuko omata yarwe omangete o 2,86 yaherukire motjihuro ohongora okuza korutu rouye rombwiro yovanatje motji-huro ohongora tjehi indi o Denmarka, o Copenhagen. Shangula wina wa tjivisire kutja otuveze atuhe tuturi mozombokoto makuvazewa notuheranyungu, omatemba worupa rondjururiro na ngenana kuyeine kutja omata inga yevaze moruveze. Watjere ovandu avehe kumwe o 2,188,487 vamuna omata morukosi orutenga nderi 100%. O Ministeri ye yatoora orukosi orutue roku-honga ovature ohepero you-kohoke. Wape ovature on-dunge yo kukoha ovikurya, tjinene nene ovihape ngunda ave hiyevirya kutja vepenge okutoora omutjise imbwi mbuhonina omundu no maremaneno wozombwini, okwiihamwa otjiuru, oku-kotora netambo. Ngunda aperi nao Shan-gula wahivi ovature koku-vatera ohoromende noma-temba morukosi orutenga. Watjere ouharupu inbwi watjitire kutja o Ministeri ye ivaze oviwana avihe oupupu. “Korui ku pi, konganda ku pi?” omuhungire weyuva okaṋepo okakuru kOswanu ya Namibia mOmbongarero yOtjiwaṋa, Usutuaije Maamberua, ma pura nao, ama hungirire kokutja tjii hapo oruyano rwapamwe pokati kohoromende ya Namibia noyehi rOvandoitji, wina ndji tjiukwa otjOjoint Declaration, ousipi OJD, ya unda pi. Maamberua wa ri omuhungire weyuva pomazemburukiro omatenga i yozondekurona ozeni wEyuva rOmazemburukiro wOtjiṱiro Otjindjandja Osondaha mOtjomuise. Ozondekurona za zemburukire 28 ku Kambundu nganduu komazemburukiro waro kotjiveta i yohoromende Otjeyuva rOtjiwa¿a Romazemburukiro wOtjiÞiro Otjindjandja. “Korui ku pi, konganda ku pi? wina ra kete tjinene okuza komazemburukiro wa Sondaha tjinga nambano ozondekurona novazapamwe na ihi otjiwaṋa atjihe tja Namibia novaṱatjari mouye atji nozonḓuma zokutjiwa kutja nambano hapo ohoromende mai tjiti vi? Ya ri ongahukiro kutja ozondekurona za kurama otjotjiku tja Tjaveva kongotwe yomayuva inga. Owo nga yakurwa i yOmbongarero yOtjiwaṋa kehi yombepo ya Maamberua mo-2016. Kutja tji tja sewa po uriri nai ohoromende okuzeuparisa omayuva nga. Kazondekurona porwazo nungwari ovanaruyameto pekepeke va yandjere oruyameto komazemburukiro weyuva ndi momayuva ingo nga kekwa tji ya ri 29 ku Kambundu. Mu wo mu mu na ngwa ri okaṋepo kOmbongarero yOtjiwaṋa kOswapo ya Namibia, Anton von Wietersheim, eye wina ngu ri ondekurona yOvandoitji. “Eṱe atuhe, otjovazapamwe Ovavapa ovahungire vOtjindoitji poo rarwe - oruveze orure rwohuurire rwomakuruhungi yetu pamwe na eṋe nombangu yotjivara mbu twa vyarere, nu kovazapamwe mbaave hendekwa tjinene tji tja ri otjiihamise notjihina ouwe komutima, twa sokupeta oviuru vyetu nomerisusuparisiro nohoṋi nondengero … amatu itavere nohoṋi komuihamo weṋu … natu yarisa ondengero yetu komuano eṋe mbu mwa roporora eke rondjesirasaneno, amamu rihekenene ku eṱe okurikwamba ku eṋe nokumupa oruyameto mokupaha pamwe omaandero kombameno yorukapitaveze momazuvasaneno youumwe,” von Wietersheim ma tja nao.

I Mbatjiua Ngavirue OTJOMUISE Oruveze maru yende a maru susupara omatjindiro wo nyama no ma ndjembere wa Namibia po matumbo motjitamba tjo marandisiro tjo Ruwano rwa Europa tji maye yenda tjiyeri etenga ku Rozondu mo 2008. Ondumbo ya peke o Namibia ndiri kara naro kehi yo mazuvasaneno ya Lome okuza kongutukiro yaro iheya kutja o Namibia movirandisiwa tjiva ri kotorerwe otjimariva tjo zo peresende ape o 98 kovirandisiwa vyaro pendje nehi ko Ruwano rwa Europa no ku suta ozo peresende mbari uriri. Posyo omazeva yo rutu ro ma randisasaneno ro u ye, o World Trade Organisation (WTO), yetjaera ondumbo ya peke komahi tjiva. Okuza ko 2000 o Namibia ri parukira mondumbo ya peke indji kehi yoma yandjerero wa peke wo WTO okuyandjera omarongerero ngunda omazeva wayo aye hiyeya mo ma ungurisiro. Posyo oruwano rwa Europa, no mahi ya Africa, Caribbean na Pacific mo 2000 ya zuvasana oku pingenisa omazuvasaneno wa Lome ngehatja ku kwazu evango nga ku yaruke evango no mazu vasaneno wa Cotonou ngetja nao. Ezeva rotjikoro ro ru kondua ro ma randisasaneno ro ma zuvasaneno wa Cotonou ritja mo ma yandero wombura indji tjiyeri 31 ku Tjitarazu otupa atuhe tuaso kutja tua isa oku tumbasana nongarera mo ma randisasaneno. Ondjandero tjimanga yondjindo ombwa mapeya a i zunda otjitamba tja Namibia tjo tu tumbo no vi kunwa. Ndoovazu otupa ka tu tiasanene omwano warwe mape hee kutja ovirandisiwa pendje vya Namibia vyo tu tumbo no vi kunwa mavi sutisiwa otjimariva otji remanise iyo Ruwano rwa Europa. Kehi yo ma zuvazaneno wa Cotonou ondjindo ombwa ndjaripo ma i so oku pingenwa iyo omazeva wo ma randisasaneno ya ku kwazu evango ku yaruka evango. Ongendo onene yo vanarupa motjitamba tjo tu tumbo no vi kunwa okoo kutja nai omahungiriro kumwe ka ye ya hara omuhunga.Otjihazendu kombanda ya nao o koo kutja o Namibia rimunika ayo epotu ehina o mu rinane korupangu nu riri korundende ro kuwa okuza ko ruuwa mo u potu waro. Pehungi ro kutara motjina ihi ndari muno Oritjatatu, Onongo Gerhard Erasmus wo Nganda yOmahongero wOkombanda imo South Africa indji o Stellenbosch, watjere o Namibia nomahi o maza pamwe mo SADC kayena omyano omingi oku ri vatera pendje no ku tiasana komutima kuna oruwano rwa Europa notutu tuarwe. Wa kozere omaundjiro kangamwa kutja o WTO mapeya ayi ngunda a ma yituruke o maungurisiro wo mazeva wayo. Kangamwa omarundururiro komazeva wo WTO maye hepa omaraka o 75% zo unepo worutu indui no mahi wa Asia na Latin America nge ha parurwa iyo mazuvasaneno wa Cotonou mapeya aye hakara no tjari. #WEATHER Windhoek,NA clear sky 19.3 ° C 21 ° 18 ° 14% 1.5kmh 0% Sun 18 ° Mon 19 ° Tue 19 ° Wed 20 ° Thu 17 °

Indi ondari embo e hongonekwa ra Mbakumua Hengari, omu nane omupe wo Komando ya Tjomuise yerapi ro ruhapo kehi yo Tjirata Tjombazu Tjovambanderu tjo Mbara Otjitambi, Karikondua Aletha Nguvauva. Wa zemburukisa o komando ye indji kutja tji ya ungura ma i zemburukwa mu imbi mbi ya tjita na weza ko kutja ingwi ngu ma kamuna ondangu onenene poo ondjambi onenene eengwi ngu ma ungurire ovandu avehe oku kapita ovakwao avehe. “Mo u karere omu muna ouhona. O u karere omburi o u hona. O kutja o u karere orundu tji mo u ngurire ovandu.” Po tji tji twa ihi Hengari opa raisirwe no ku tjivisiwa ko tjiwa¿a otjo munane werapi mOtjomuise. Munao Akas Ndjoze, ngwa ri no tjihavero ihi otje muyandjere komunane wo ko mbanda mbanda we rapi rOtjiserandu, Kuseueendo Kambirongo, kutja me mu Þizire mo vivava vye nu me mu raisire ondjira yo vi tjitwa vyo marapi. Hengari omwini oku yaruka no mambo wo Mbaratjitambiona ombura yo zo mbura tjatjere ma kambura kombaikiha yo muyaruke Ombara Otjitambi yOvaherero, Kuaima Riruako, matja tjingetjo ma kambura ko mbaikiha ya Kambirongo kutja me mu nane korupangu mo vyo trupa otjo vandu mberi mo tjirongo tjimwe aveyevari.
